title: Claude Fable 5 plays Factorio
summary: Claude Fable 5 autonomously plays Factorio, the factory-building game, strategizing and building an automated factory independently. The demonstration shows the model's ability to handle complex planning and sequential decision-making tasks.
writeup: Claude Fable 5 plays Factorio autonomously, strategizing and building an automated factory without human intervention. The demonstration tests the model as an AI agent on long-horizon planning and sequential decision-making, two capabilities the factory-building game stresses directly. The takeaway: the model handles complex planning tasks and builds an automated factory independently.
